scripts.dev: rm -f public/_app/*.js public/_app/*.css && bun x concurrently "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:client"
scripts.build:client: rm -f public/_app/*.js public/_app/*.css && bun run build.ts
scripts.build:prod: rm -rf .dist && mkdir -p .dist && NODE_ENV=production bun run build.ts && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile .dist/server src/server/index.ts && cp -r public .dist/public
scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:server
